allowed_work: Prepare German eID and AusweisApp readiness plans.
Define minimal verified-claim sets and consent evidence.
Review IAM projection readiness for Entra ID, Oracle IAM and SCIM targets.
Prepare metadata-only evidence templates and Day2 follow-up plans.
prohibited_work: Store eID raw data, identity document dumps, secrets, certificates, access tokens, one-time codes or session cookies in Git.
Upload real identity data or client personal data to an LLM without an explicit approved data-processing basis.
Execute production eID flows or IAM writes without reviewed connector code and human approval.
Reuse verified claims outside the documented purpose.
day0: Confirm tenant, purpose, actor role, reviewer role, target system and data boundary.
Confirm privacy, consent, retention and evidence requirements.
day1: Produce plan preview for eID verification and optional IAM projection.
Check connector readiness without processing real identity data.
day2: Review expired assertions, revocations, failed projections, retention drift and connector recertification.
required_accounts_or_approvals: Approved data-processing basis for personal data
